コレクターのために作られた
// WHAT IS POKISTOCK

Built byCollectors.

For Collectors.

The Pokémon TCG community keeps growing - but the tools haven't kept up. Collectors are forced across multiple platforms, missing stock drops, dealing with unverified sellers and paying over the odds.

PokiStock changes that. One platform bringing together trusted UK vendors, card shows, grading companies and collectors into a single, streamlined hub.

Discovery. Trust. Transparency. Built with the Community. Designed for the Hobby. This is what the UK TCG community deserves.

"Because the UK Pokémon TCG Community deserves better."
- Carly, Founder of PokiStock™
POKISTOCK_PLATFORM.JSON

"region": "United Kingdom",
"status": "LIVE ✓",
 
// COMMUNITY
"vendors": true,
"collectors": true,
"card_shows": true,
"grading": true,
 
"phase": 1,
"marketplace": "COMING_SOON",
"apps": ["iOS", "Android"]
// CORE FEATURES

What You CanDo Now.

01
Vendor Discovery
Explore a growing network of verified UK TCG vendors. Live inventory, grail pieces and stock updates in one feed.
LIVE NOW
02
Card Show Finder
Discover upcoming UK card shows. See which POKISTOCK vendors are attending and browse their stock in advance.
LIVE NOW
03
Wishlist & Alerts
Add grails to your wishlist. Get notified the moment a vendor lists it. Never miss a drop.
LIVE NOW
04
Real-Time Feed
New stock, vendors, shows - surfaces in real time. No searching required.
LIVE NOW
05
In-App Marketplace
Phase 2 brings secure in-app purchasing, direct checkout and end-to-end buyer protection.
COMING SOON
06
Vendor Profiles
Full profiles with inventory, ratings, show history and social links. Know who you're buying from.
LIVE NOW
// ROADMAP

Where WeAre Heading.

// PHASE 01 - LIVE
Foundation
  • Vendor discovery & profiles
  • Real-time activity feed
  • Card show finder
  • Wishlist & alerts
  • iOS & Android apps
  • Community platform
// PHASE 02 - SOON
Marketplace
  • In-app purchasing
  • Secure checkout
  • Payment processing
  • Verified vendor badges
  • Buyer protection
  • Direct vendor messaging
// PHASE 03 - FUTURE
Ecosystem
  • Grading company integration
  • Price tracking & history
  • Community events
  • Creator partnerships
  • Collection management
  • Trade & swap tools
公式パートナーシップ · OFFICIAL PARTNER
// FEATURED PARTNERSHIP

The POKISTOCKFloor.

★ OFFICIAL PARTNER
CARD-É-DIEM · COMMUNITY TCG EXPO

Card-É-Diem
October Show 2026

Saturday, 10 October 2026 · 10:00–16:00
Newbury Racecourse, Berkshire
200+ Vendor Tables · Multi-Floor Expo
🏛️
A Floor Named After Us
Card-É-Diem have officially named a floor at their October show "The POKISTOCK Floor" - a dedicated space celebrating our partnership with the UK TCG community. Come find us there!
// ABOUT THE SHOW

The UK's premier TCG experience returns to the iconic Newbury Racecourse. From Pokémon and Yu-Gi-Oh! to One Piece, Lorcana and Magic: The Gathering - this is the destination for collectors.

Spanning multiple floors with 200+ vendor tables, the Artisan & Indie Collective, the Tattoo Tavern, a brand-new Cosplay Contest, and a supervised Kids Club. Free on-site parking and a train station directly onsite.

"
The secret is out…

Welcome to the POKISTOCK Floor! We are incredibly proud to partner with POKISTOCK. Their app is exactly what this community needed - a space that genuinely supports, connects, and gives every single one of us the safe space we need.

Our community is full of wonderful collectors, brilliant vendors, and amazing stores. Now, thanks to POKISTOCK, they are all just one incredible click away!

Having them on board as our community floor sponsor is a perfect match, and Card-É-Diem couldn't be prouder to partner with this platform. Let's show them some love!
- Card-É-Diem, via Instagram
Buy Show Tickets Show Details & Info Visit Website ↗

公式グレーディングパートナー · OFFICIAL GRADING PARTNER
// OFFICIAL GRADING PARTNER

Graded byssint.

★ GRADING PARTNER
AI-Powered Grading System
UK's First Homegrown AI Grader
Laser-Engraved Aluminium Labels
UV-Protected Crystal-Clear Slabs
Turnarounds from 2 Business Days
No Value-Based Upcharges
SSINT Registry Verification
Pokémon, Sports & Japanese Cards
ssintgrading.com @ssintgrading SSINT Registry - Verify Your Cards
// OFFICIAL POKISTOCK GRADING PARTNER

ssint. Grading

Specialised Services in Inspection and Notation of Treasures
UK's First Homegrown AI-Powered Trading Card Grading Company
🤖
AI-Powered. UK-Built. Collector-First.
SSINT is the UK's first grading company to develop and deploy its own in-house AI grading system - built using multiple trained models for defect detection, surface analysis, and precise centring. Every card gets the same care regardless of value.
// ABOUT THE PARTNERSHIP

SSINT will be featured as an official grading partner within the POKISTOCK platform, giving collectors clear visibility into a UK-based grading service built around consistency, data, and fairness.

Every graded card is recorded on the SSINT Registry, with a digital grading certificate and raw card report highlighting any detected defects. Slabs feature laser-engraved aluminium labels, UV-protected crystal-clear cases, and support cards from 35pt to 180pt - no penny sleeves, ever.

Grading fees are segmented solely by turnaround time - 2 to 20 business days - with no upcharging based on card value. Fair, transparent, consistent.

"
ssint. (Specialised Services in Inspection and Notation of Treasures), the UK's first homegrown AI-powered trading card grading company, is pleased to announce a strategic partnership with Pokistock, a UK-based, collector-first platform created to bring clarity, trust, and confidence to the Pokémon trading card community.

This partnership brings together two UK-founded brands built from lived experience within the hobby, united by a shared commitment to transparency, fairness, and integrity.
- ssint. Grading, Official Partnership Announcement
Submit for Grading Try the AI Grader ↗ Read Full Announcement ↗

Sealed ProductPrice Check.

ENGLISH & JAPANESE · ETBs · BOOSTER BOXES · LIVE MARKET DATA
